category_sources: Official Bashish homepage describes changing terminal colors, font, transparency, background image, and prompts.
source_facts.description says Bashish is a theme environment for text terminals.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses the name Bashish.
docs_sources: Official Bashish homepage links a Documentation page.
Official Documentation page contains the Bashish theme HOWTO, shell support, terminal support, and getting-started instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge-hosted Bashish site provides documentation/downloads but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official Bashish homepage describes prompt changing for bash, zsh, and tcsh and terminal appearance customization.
